# Holis Wellness Center

> Holistic spa, yoga, breathwork, wellness experiences and retreats in Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica.

Holis Wellness Center offers massage and bodywork therapies, organic facials, daily yoga and movement classes, private sessions, educational courses, gift cards, and immersive wellness retreats and signature experiences.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Holis Wellness Center.
- [About](/about): Our story, philosophy, and team.
- [Treatments & Therapies](/treatments-therapies): Massage, bodywork and holistic therapy menu.
- [Signature Treatments](/signature-treatments): Curated signature experiences.
- [Classes & Events](/classes): Daily yoga, movement and workshop schedule.
- [Class Schedule](/classes/schedule): Weekly calendar of classes.
- [Private Sessions](/private-sessions): One-on-one and small-group private bookings.
- [Education & Courses](/education): Somato Awareness System and other trainings.
- [Retreats & Experiences](/retreats): Multi-day retreats, packages and single-day experiences.
- [Book a Treatment](/book): Booking flow for treatments and experiences.
- [Gift Cards](/gift-cards): Purchase gift cards.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Frequently asked questions.

## Optional

- [Spanish site](/es): Full site in Spanish.
